_meta.description: Mneme Ship Design System — Bridge/Cockpit Catalog. Bridges are Level-2 components that provide command and control stations.

bridge_types.name: Single-Seat Cockpit
bridge_types.notes: Minimal instruments, mechanical gauges. Basis: Mercury capsule.

bridge_types.name: Dual-Seat Cockpit
bridge_types.notes: Basic electroluminescent displays. Basis: Gemini, Voskhod.

bridge_types.name: Command Deck (3-Station)
bridge_types.notes: Dedicated commander, pilot, and systems stations. Basis: Apollo CM.

bridge_types.name: Flight Deck (4-Station)
bridge_types.notes: First glass cockpit with CRT displays. Overhead panel for systems. Basis: Space Shuttle flight deck.

bridge_types.name: Modular Bridge
bridge_types.notes: Reconfigurable LCD displays. Swappable control layouts. Basis: ISS Cupola + control stations.

bridge_types.name: Touchscreen Bridge
bridge_types.notes: Large touchscreens with customizable layouts. Minimal physical buttons. Basis: Crew Dragon displays.

bridge_types.name: Holographic Bridge
bridge_types.notes: Volumetric displays for 3D situational awareness. Eye-tracking control. Conceptual.
